Frequently Asked Questions:

Q: Why is my wallet not eligible?

Wallets that were not linked before the snapshot on March 25 at 4:30 PM UTC are not eligible for the initial Airdrop (Phase 1 & 2). However, any unclaimed or remaining allocations from Phase 1 & 2 will be distributed in future rounds to users who accrued points but missed linking their wallet before the snapshot.

Q: When is the next Airdrop?

Phase 3 is currently live and users are now accruing rewards. These rewards will be distributed in an upcoming airdrop. If you qualified for rewards in Phase 1 & 2 but haven't yet linked your wallet via the edgen0S dashboard, please make sure to do so to ensure eligibility for the next distribution.
